title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, March 08 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 08/03/2022
Image reference: 2022-03-08_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-march-08-2022_img1.png
Tanker: Modern Tanker values have firmed. VLCCs Nautilus and Navarin (307,300 DWT, Dec 2006 & Apr 2007, Dalian Shipbuilding Industry Corp) sold to Sinokor in an en bloc deal for USD 63.50 mil, VV en bloc value USD 61.90 mil. Aframax Axel Spirit (115,400 DWT, Apr 2004, Samsung) sold to Chinese buyers for USD 13.20 mil, VV value USD 13.40 mil - DD Due.
